event_description: Suspect performs reconnaissance on target company employees to identify potential targets for espionage.
Malware is installed on the target device, establishing a connection to external server 50.56.29.109 for command and control.
Suspect systematically accesses and exfiltrates confidential SwiftLogic Inc. documents to the external server.
Suspect initiates negotiations for the sale of stolen intellectual property via SMS and email.
Suspect attempts to renegotiate the price of the stolen intellectual property, leading to a conflict.
Suspect is found deceased under violent circumstances following the failed negotiation attempt.
